competitions.title: EAST vs WEST 24 Predictions LIVE | Michael Todd & Lars Rørbakken
competitions.summary:
East vs West 24 is almost here, and tonight we're breaking down the entire card.

Joining me is Lars Rørbakken as we go match by match, discuss the biggest storylines, and give our predictions for every supermatch at East vs West 24.

Who wins?
Who gets upset?
Which matches are being overlooked?
And where does the main event picture go from here?

We'll be taking questions from the live chat throughout the stream.

If you're attending East vs West 24 in Little Rock get your tickets now at evwzports.com if you’re ordering the PPV, use code MMT at EVWSports.com.

#Armwrestling #EastVsWest24 #MichaelTodd #LarsRorbakken #EVW24

competitions.title: My Short List… Who Won’t Back Down?
competitions.summary:
Back home in the Monster Factory and it’s time to unpack everything that happened at East vs West 24.
Rebecca and I will be going through the biggest armwrestling matches of the event, the surprises, the stories, and answering the question everyone seems to be asking…

👀 Who’s next?

We’ll talk about:
🏆 East vs West 24 match breakdowns
🔥 Standout performances
💪 How I felt during the match with Oleg Petrenko
🤔 Potential future opponents
🎥 Behind-the-scenes stories from the event
❓ Questions from the live chat

Grab a seat and join us live from the Monster Factory.
Who impressed you the most at East vs West 24?

#Armwrestling #EastVsWest24 #MonsterMichaelTodd #MichaelTodd #MonsterFactory
